title: RSS/Atom feed poller
description: Tokio task that polls configured [[feed]] entries on their poll_interval. Parse RSS 2.0 and Atom 1.0. Entry-to-Note mapping: title → bold first line, description/content:encoded → body (sanitized via ammonia), enclosure/media:content with image MIME → attachment, link → footer link, id/guid → source_ref for dedup. Content cap: 5000 chars after sanitization, truncate with read-more link. Persist last_seen_id in feed_state table.
close_reason: RSS/Atom poller, webhook endpoint, directory watcher all implemented. Sanitization via ammonia, markdown via pulldown-cmark.
